title: NBA Daily Dunk: Finals Picture Clarifies!
subtitle: Your May 27, 2026 News Digest

items.headline: Knicks Sweep Cavaliers, Secure Spot in NBA Finals!
items.summary: The New York Knicks made history last night, completing a dominant 4-0 sweep over the Cleveland Cavaliers in the Eastern Conference Finals with a resounding 130-93 victory in Game 4. They are headed to the NBA Finals for the first time since 1999.

items.headline: Thunder Take 3-2 Lead Over Spurs in Thrilling WCF Game 5!
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder edged out the San Antonio Spurs 127-114 in Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals, moving just one win away from clinching a spot in the NBA Finals. The reigning MVP, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, led the charge.

items.headline: Celtics' Joe Mazzulla Named NBA Coach of the Year!
items.summary: Boston Celtics head coach Joe Mazzulla has been awarded the NBA's Coach of the Year for the 2025-26 season.

items.headline: Thunder Dominate Spurs in Pivotal Game 5
items.summary: OKC takes a commanding 3-2 series lead after a strong performance in Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals.

items.headline: SGA Leads Thunder to Crucial Victory
items.statContext: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (OKC) in Game 5 vs. SAS.

items.headline: Caruso Sparks Thunder Bench
items.statContext: Alex Caruso (OKC) off the bench in Game 5, including 4 threes.

items.headline: McCain Shines in First Playoff Start
items.statContext: Jared McCain (OKC) in his playoff debut start in Game 5.

items.headline: Brunson Named ECF MVP
items.statContext: Knicks star Jalen Brunson awarded Eastern Conference Finals MVP.

items.headline: Deni Avdija's Breakout Season for Blazers
items.statContext: Deni Avdija (POR) averaged career-highs in the 2025-26 season.

items.headline: Wemby Limited in Game 5 Loss
items.statContext: Victor Wembanyama (SAS) in Game 5, his series-low.

items.headline: Giannis Antetokounmpo at Center of Buzzing Trade Rumors
items.summary: The NBA trade market is heating up, with Giannis Antetokounmpo's future in Milwaukee dominating discussions after the Bucks missed the playoffs. Other stars like Ja Morant and Kyrie Irving are also generating significant trade speculation.

items.headline: NBA Finals Set to Begin June 3rd
items.summary: With the Knicks securing the Eastern Conference title, the NBA Finals are slated to tip off on June 3rd. The Western Conference opponent will be decided between the Thunder and Spurs.

items.headline: Thunder Battling Injuries as WCF Continues
items.summary: The Oklahoma City Thunder are currently without key players Jalen Williams and Ajay Mitchell, who were sidelined for Game 5 of the Western Conference Finals.
